title: Job Vacancies at Hana-Mera Recruitment
content:
At Hana-Mera Recruitment, we specialize in helping startups hire smart, not just fast. We understand the unique pressure founders face: tight timelines, limited resources, and the critical need to make every hire count. One wrong hire can slow momentum. The right one? Game-changing. With a proven track record of helping startups across Nigeria, India, the US, and beyond, we’ve successfully placed high-impact talent across product, engineering, operations, growth, and leadership.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



From seed stage founders making their first hire to scaling startups expanding globally, we’ve been the trusted partner behind growth. But we’re not just here for startups, we’re here for talent, too. We help job seekers become standout candidates through CV revamps, LinkedIn optimization, and personalized career strategy. Whether you’re breaking into the startup world or taking the next big step, we help you get seen and get hired. We know startups. We know talent. And we know how to bring the right people together when it matters most.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.)Store Manager

Job Location: Wuse2, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a competent and results-driven Store Manager to oversee the full operations of our Abuja store.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing daily activities, driving sales, and ensuring smooth and efficient store operations.
	This role requires someone who can work independently, take initiative, and deliver measurable results.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage the day-to-day operations of the store efficiently
	Ensure the store is fully prepared and operational before opening hours
	Record daily sales, expenses, and transactions accurately
	Maintain cleanliness, organization, and visual appeal of the store
	Supervise store assistants and coordinate with delivery riders
	Provide regular updates and performance reports
	Implement strategies to increase customer traffic and revenue


Requirements


	Proven experience in retail, sales, or store management
	Strong sales and negotiation skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Highly organized with strong attention to detail
	Ability to work independently and take initiative
	Trustworthy, responsible, and accountable
	Must be based in Abuja (preferably around Wuse 2)


Preferred Qualities


	Smart, presentable, and professional
	Goal-oriented and performance-driven
	Ability to multitask and work under pressure
	Basic knowledge of social media/online sales is an added advantage.


Salary
N150,000/month + Performance Bonus

Application Closing Date: 31st May, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

2.) Customer Care Representative (Jewelry Store)

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule: 5 Days a Week | 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM

Job Summary


	We are seeking a smart, customer-focused, and well-presented Customer Care Representative for a jewelry store in Surulere.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for attending to customers, handling inquiries, maintaining excellent customer relationships, and supporting in-store sales and operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Attend to walk-in and online customer inquiries professionally
	Assist customers with product information and purchases
	Manage customer complaints and ensure timely resolution
	Follow up with customers and maintain strong relationships
	Support order processing, packaging, and store coordination
	Maintain a neat and welcoming customer experience


Requirements


	Previous experience in customer service, retail, or sales is an added advantage
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Smart, courteous, and customer-oriented
	Basic social media/WhatsApp communication skills is a plus
	Candidate must reside in or around Surulere (proximity is key).


Salary
N120,000 Monthly.

Application Closing Date: 31st May, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

3.) Operations, Client & Creative Coordinator

Job Location: Lagos, (Hybrid)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 


	They are looking for a highly organized, proactive, and creative professional to support business operations, client engagement, sales coordination, and marketing execution.
	The ideal candidate should be detail-oriented, customer-focused, and able to manage multiple responsibilities while ensuring smooth daily operations and strong brand delivery.


Key Responsibilities
Operations & Administration:


	Coordinate daily business activities and internal communications
	Prepare proposals, quotations, and business documents
	Maintain organized records and operational processes.


Client Relations:


	Respond to client inquiries and follow-ups
	Support client onboarding and relationship management
	Track and maintain customer interaction records.


Sales Support:


	Assist with pricing and product listings
	Coordinate with suppliers and vendors
	Track orders and support sales processes.


Marketing & Creative Support:


	Create captions and product descriptions for marketing campaigns
	Support social media execution and digital marketing activities
	Provide creative direction for flyers, ads, and promotional materials
	Use Canva or collaborate with designers to maintain brand consistency.


Team Coordination:


	Liaise with team members and vendors
	Track tasks and ensure timely execution of projects.


Requirements


	Experience in operations, administration, sales support, or client-facing roles
	Strong communication and organizational skills
	Customer-focused mindset
	Familiarity with social media and digital marketing
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools.


Nice to Have:


	Experience in tech retail or e-commerce
	Canva or basic graphic design skills
	Knowledge of pricing or inventory coordination.


Work Structure:


	Remote / Hybrid.


Application Closing Date: 22nd May, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Position as the subject of the email.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Hardware Engineer",
  "description": "Moniepoint Incorporated is a global business payments and banking platform and recently became QED Investors&rsquo; first investment in Africa. We are the partner of choice for over 600,000 businesses of all sizes, powering the dreams of SMBs and providing them with equal access to the tools they need to grow and scale.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hardware Engineer

Job Location: Abuja

Job Purpose


	The Hardware Engineer ensures that our physical touchpoints&mdash;our POS terminals&mdash;are reliable, innovative, and always ready to serve our users.
	You&rsquo;ll be responsible for the full hardware lifecycle, from designing circuit boards to empowering our repair technicians with the mastery they need to keep our fleet running.
	You are the link between complex electronics and the everyday business owners who depend on them.


Key Responsibilities


	Design &amp; Innovation: Create electronic hardware circuits and PCB layouts that meet our high standards for performance and reliability.
	Product Mastery: Maintain and update the technical &quot;source of truth&quot; for our designs, including parts lists and bills of materials.
	Empower Others: Develop training and procedures that help our repair technicians work with precision and speed.
	Continuous Improvement: Create and update repair manuals that make complex fixes feel simple.
	Rigorous Testing: Conduct hands-on testing of products and tools, identifying design gaps and recommending modifications to make our hardware even better.
	Strategic Research: Analyse hardware specifications and market trends to determine the feasibility of new designs or modifications.
	Documentation: Keep detailed, accurate records of repair processes and results to help us learn from every issue identified.
	Collaborate: Work closely with technicians and other engineers to ensure our hardware strategy is aligned across the team.


What success looks like


	Reliability: Our hardware designs are stable, and POS terminals have high uptime in the field.
	Competency: Repair technicians feel equipped and confident thanks to your training and manuals.
	Efficiency: The time taken to diagnose and repair hardware issues decreases through better documentation and processes.
	Innovation: Your research leads to hardware modifications that directly benefit our business users.


Qualifications


	A Degree in Electrical / Electronics Engineering or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
	3-5 years experience as a hardware/electronics engineer
	Experience in terminal or electronics repair is a strong advantage.
	Strong analytical skills&mdash;you enjoy connecting the dots and solving puzzles.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications for documentation and tracking.
	Excellent attention to detail; you take pride in accuracy and keeping things tidy.
	A proactive, solution-oriented approach&mdash;you don&#39;t wait for instructions to make things better.


About you


	You&#39;re a Problem Solver: You enjoy the &quot;how&quot; and &quot;why&quot; behind hardware and love making things work.
	You&#39;re a Teacher: You enjoy sharing your knowledge and helping technicians grow their skills.
	You&#39;re Driven by Mastery: You don&#39;t settle for &quot;good enough&quot; and are always looking for ways to improve quality and efficiency.
	You&#39;re Human: You communicate clearly and treat your teammates with respect, regardless of their role.


What we can offer you


	Culture: We put our people first and prioritize the well-being of every team member. We&rsquo;ve built a company where all opinions carry weight and where all voices are heard. We value and respect each other and always look out for one another. Above all, we are human.
	Learning: We have a learning-and-development-focused environment, with an emphasis on knowledge sharing, training, and regular internal technical talks.
	Compensation: You&rsquo;ll receive an attractive salary, pension, health insurance, annual bonus, plus other benefits.
",

Hardware Engineer Job at Moniepoint




        
    

        
        Moniepoint Incorporated is a global business payments and banking platform and recently became QED Investors’ first investment in Africa. We are the partner of choice for over 600,000 businesses of all sizes, powering the dreams of SMBs and providing them with equal access to the tools they need to grow and scale.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hardware Engineer

Job Location: Abuja

Job Purpose
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Hardware Engineer ensures that our physical touchpoints—our POS terminals—are reliable, innovative, and always ready to serve our users.
	You’ll be responsible for the full hardware lifecycle, from designing circuit boards to empowering our repair technicians with the mastery they need to keep our fleet running.
	You are the link between complex electronics and the everyday business owners who depend on them.


Key Responsibilities


	Design & Innovation: Create electronic hardware circuits and PCB layouts that meet our high standards for performance and reliability.
	Product Mastery: Maintain and update the technical "source of truth" for our designs, including parts lists and bills of materials.
	Empower Others: Develop training and procedures that help our repair technicians work with precision and speed.
	Continuous Improvement: Create and update repair manuals that make complex fixes feel simple.
	Rigorous Testing: Conduct hands-on testing of products and tools, identifying design gaps and recommending modifications to make our hardware even better.
	Strategic Research: Analyse hardware specifications and market trends to determine the feasibility of new designs or modifications.
	Documentation: Keep detailed, accurate records of repair processes and results to help us learn from every issue identified.
	Collaborate: Work closely with technicians and other engineers to ensure our hardware strategy is aligned across the team.


What success looks like


	Reliability: Our hardware designs are stable, and POS terminals have high uptime in the field.
	Competency: Repair technicians feel equipped and confident thanks to your training and manuals.
	Efficiency: The time taken to diagnose and repair hardware issues decreases through better documentation and processes.
	Innovation: Your research leads to hardware modifications that directly benefit our business users.


Qualifications


	A Degree in Electrical / Electronics Engineering or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
	3-5 years experience as a hardware/electronics engineer
	Experience in terminal or electronics repair is a strong advantage.
	Strong analytical skills—you enjoy connecting the dots and solving puzzles.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications for documentation and tracking.
	Excellent attention to detail; you take pride in accuracy and keeping things tidy.
	A proactive, solution-oriented approach—you don't wait for instructions to make things better.


About you


	You're a Problem Solver: You enjoy the "how" and "why" behind hardware and love making things work.
	You're a Teacher: You enjoy sharing your knowledge and helping technicians grow their skills.
	You're Driven by Mastery: You don't settle for "good enough" and are always looking for ways to improve quality and efficiency.
	You're Human: You communicate clearly and treat your teammates with respect, regardless of their role.


What we can offer you


	Culture: We put our people first and prioritize the well-being of every team member. We’ve built a company where all opinions carry weight and where all voices are heard. We value and respect each other and always look out for one another. Above all, we are human.
	Learning: We have a learning-and-development-focused environment, with an emphasis on knowledge sharing, training, and regular internal technical talks.
	Compensation: You’ll receive an attractive salary, pension, health insurance, annual bonus, plus other benefits.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Secretary",
  "description": "Marsand Bespoke Joinery - Our client, a furniture company, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary

Job Location: Awoyaya, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary&nbsp;


	We are seeking a highly organised and professional Secretary to support the daily operations of a busy furniture company specialising in kitchens, wardrobes, bespoke furniture, and interior fittings.
	The ideal candidate must have excellent communication skills, strong administrative abilities, and the capacity to work in a fast-paced environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Answer phone calls, emails, and customer enquiries professionally.
	Schedule appointments, meetings, and site visits for management and sales teams.
	Maintain office files, quotations, invoices, and customer records accurately.
	Prepare documents, reports, and correspondence as required.
	Coordinate with suppliers, installers, designers, and clients regarding ongoing projects.
	Follow up on orders, deliveries, and customer payments.
	Assist with showroom administration and daily office operations.
	Manage staff attendance records and internal communications.
	Handle basic social media or online customer enquiries when required.
	Ensure the office environment remains organised and efficient.


Requirements


	Previous experience as a Secretary, Administrative Assistant, or Office Administrator preferred.
	Good knowledge of Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook).
	Strong verbal and written communication skills.
	Excellent organisational and multitasking abilities.
	Ability to work independently and maintain confidentiality.
	Professional appearance and customer service skills.
	Experience in a furniture, kitchen, wardrobe, or interior company is an advantage.


Skills:


	Time management
	Attention to detail
	Communication and interpersonal skills
	Problem-solving ability
	Filing and record keeping
	Team coordination.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: Marsandinternationalco@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Secretary Job at Marsand Bespoke Joinery




        
    

        
        Marsand Bespoke Joinery - Our client, a furniture company, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary

Job Location: Awoyaya, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 


	We are seeking a highly organised and professional Secretary to support the daily operations of a busy furniture company specialising in kitchens, wardrobes, bespoke furniture, and interior fittings.
	The ideal candidate must have excellent communication skills, strong administrative abilities, and the capacity to work in a fast-paced environment.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Answer phone calls, emails, and customer enquiries professionally.
	Schedule appointments, meetings, and site visits for management and sales teams.
	Maintain office files, quotations, invoices, and customer records accurately.
	Prepare documents, reports, and correspondence as required.
	Coordinate with suppliers, installers, designers, and clients regarding ongoing projects.
	Follow up on orders, deliveries, and customer payments.
	Assist with showroom administration and daily office operations.
	Manage staff attendance records and internal communications.
	Handle basic social media or online customer enquiries when required.
	Ensure the office environment remains organised and efficient.


Requirements


	Previous experience as a Secretary, Administrative Assistant, or Office Administrator preferred.
	Good knowledge of Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook).
	Strong verbal and written communication skills.
	Excellent organisational and multitasking abilities.
	Ability to work independently and maintain confidentiality.
	Professional appearance and customer service skills.
	Experience in a furniture, kitchen, wardrobe, or interior company is an advantage.


Skills:


	Time management
	Attention to detail
	Communication and interpersonal skills
	Problem-solving ability
	Filing and record keeping
	Team coordination.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Operations Manager",
  "description": "Jobs Expert, a recruitment services firm, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Manager

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilties
Project &amp; Workflow Management:


	Timeline Oversight: Develop, track, and manage project milestones to ensure designs are completed on schedule.
	Workflow Optimization: Optimize design workflows and document best practices to improve team productivity.
	Quality Control: Coordinate with supervisors and project managers to ensure finished products and installations meet the firm&#39;s quality standards.


Supply Chain &amp; Procurement:


	Vendor Management: Build and manage strong relationships with external service providers, contractors, furniture suppliers, and artisans.
	Purchase Orders: Execute and oversee purchasing operations, tracking orders from placement through delivery.
	Inventory &amp; Logistics: Monitor stock control, coordinate warehousing, and manage the delivery and installation of furnishings at client sites.&nbsp;


Financial Oversight &amp; Bookkeeping:


	Budget Tracking: Collaborate with finance teams and designers to monitor material and labor costs, ensuring projects remain within budgetary limits.
	Billing &amp; Payments: Oversee the collection of client retainers, process supplier invoices, and manage disbursements.
	KPI Reporting: Track operational efficiency and provide data-driven recommendations to management to drive revenue growth.&nbsp;


Human Resources &amp; Team Coordination:


	Staffing &amp; Onboarding: Assist HR in the recruitment, hiring, and onboarding of new design and administrative staff.
	Performance Management: Facilitate annual performance reviews and help define goals for the creative team.
	Cross-Functional Collaboration: Foster a collaborative, high-performance culture by ensuring the design, sales, marketing, and admin teams work cohesively.


Studio &amp; Administrative Operations:


	Studio Administration: Oversee daily studio operations, including IT coordination, software licensing, and general office maintenance.
	Compliance &amp; Safety: Ensure adherence to health and safety regulations, insurance policies, and legal compliance (e.g., GDPR).
	Facilities Management: Organize studio layout and handle upkeep to maintain an inspiring and functional environment for staff and visiting clients.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s Degree with 2 - 3 years of experience.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: jobs.expert@yahoo.com and cc: faith.okpara@juwonelectric.com using &quot;OPS MANAGER&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Operations Manager Job at Jobs Expert




        
    

        
        Jobs Expert, a recruitment services firm, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Manager

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilties
Project & Workflow Management:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Timeline Oversight: Develop, track, and manage project milestones to ensure designs are completed on schedule.
	Workflow Optimization: Optimize design workflows and document best practices to improve team productivity.
	Quality Control: Coordinate with supervisors and project managers to ensure finished products and installations meet the firm's quality standards.


Supply Chain & Procurement:


	Vendor Management: Build and manage strong relationships with external service providers, contractors, furniture suppliers, and artisans.
	Purchase Orders: Execute and oversee purchasing operations, tracking orders from placement through delivery.
	Inventory & Logistics: Monitor stock control, coordinate warehousing, and manage the delivery and installation of furnishings at client sites. 


Financial Oversight & Bookkeeping:


	Budget Tracking: Collaborate with finance teams and designers to monitor material and labor costs, ensuring projects remain within budgetary limits.
	Billing & Payments: Oversee the collection of client retainers, process supplier invoices, and manage disbursements.
	KPI Reporting: Track operational efficiency and provide data-driven recommendations to management to drive revenue growth. 


Human Resources & Team Coordination:


	Staffing & Onboarding: Assist HR in the recruitment, hiring, and onboarding of new design and administrative staff.
	Performance Management: Facilitate annual performance reviews and help define goals for the creative team.
	Cross-Functional Collaboration: Foster a collaborative, high-performance culture by ensuring the design, sales, marketing, and admin teams work cohesively.


Studio & Administrative Operations:


	Studio Administration: Oversee daily studio operations, including IT coordination, software licensing, and general office maintenance.
	Compliance & Safety: Ensure adherence to health and safety regulations, insurance policies, and legal compliance (e.g., GDPR).
	Facilities Management: Organize studio layout and handle upkeep to maintain an inspiring and functional environment for staff and visiting clients.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s Degree with 2 - 3 years of experience.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: [email protected] and cc: [email protected] using "OPS MANAGER" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
